bdbcat pushed 80 commits to branch v5.9.x. Commits by bdbcat (48), nohal (23), leamas (3) and others (6).

  • Include the shapefile basemaps in macOS app bundle. #3984 (4c5b72cf305)
  • Add translatable string "default color" (f81235cb316)
  • Update plugin pot language files (3b1fd765243)
  • Correct potential fault on canvas config change with orphan properties dialog. (73ed88935ea)
  • Merge branch 'master' of github.com:OpenCPN/OpenCPN (eb79b2034a2)
  • Correct update of chart download progress dialog #3987 (4c59033ee3e)
  • Correct route rendering crossing IDL (180E/W) #3421 (b970810bffe)
  • Correct ownship track capture when crossing IDL (180E/W) #3420 (0de0e61cf85)
  • Fix image dump test (ec584560c6d)
  • Improve chart bar and MUIBar relative widths and placement, especially for smaller screens (edf5315d1e4)
  • Correctly employ defaultBoatSpeed from Options dialog for new routes. (d3ab2921c51)
  • Correct FTBS, prior commit (09a406d6960)
  • AIS N2k Parse PGN129041. Include ATON type Closes #3988 (e04c99cfd24)
  • Correct msvc macro collision with std::min (df76c45fee4)
  • Merge pull request #3991 from ttlappalainen/master (42fc6f5ddf6)
  • Merge pull request #3994 from Hakansv/atontype (d154b340742)
  • Correct occasion fault on startup. (47ac8b4c2da)
  • Revert "Adjust toolbar scale for Win scaled display, also refine tooltip positions #3593" (db12608bebe)
  • Merge branch 'master' of github.com:OpenCPN/OpenCPN (e4faa49efcd)
  • DB: Correct the position of secondary text data in dials. (5592e1e4797)
